items.title: AI and the rise of the universal entertainment app
items.summary: Over the past decade, streaming platforms competed by dominating individual formats like music, video, podcasts, or audiobooks. Now, as AI makes it easier to create, organize, and recommend content, those distinctions are fading, pushing companies like Spotify, Netflix, YouTube, and TikTok to become all-purpose entertainment destinations instead.

What we love

What’s especially nice about this BougeRV area light is that it can be used while camping or at home, bringing along a 3,200mAh battery that not only keeps spaces lit for up to six nights on a full charge, but also doubles as a compact power bank. It has five adjustable brightness levels for its four lighting modes – one of which is an S.O.S signal for emergencies.

items.title: The newer silver East Oak 30-inch electric smoker with a built-in meat probe can be yours at $270 right now
items.summary: Over at Amazon, we just spotted the Mist Silver or Night Blue East Oak 30-inch Electric Smoker for Outdoors with a built-in meat probe that have dropped to $269.97 shipped. Normally $300 at full price, this deal is the most frequent discount we have seen on the newer silver colorway, while the Night Blue has seen a wider array of discounts, beaten out in 2026 by short-lived dips to $269 and $255 during June’s Prime Day event. You’re getting a solid chance at the second-lowest price we have tracked, which only sits $15 above the all-time low, if you missed out on it in June. You can find a few more deals on outdoor storage, furniture, and a fire pit in the official Amazon storefront here.
